Ibn Haldun University's 6th Summer School in the USA: A Journey of Knowledge and Cultural Exploration

03.08.2023

Ibn Haldun University, in collaboration with George Mason University, organizes its 6th Summer School in the United States of America. The first group of our students is currently engaged in a month-long academic and cultural experience.

The program offers diverse courses in social sciences, empowering students with valuable insights and knowledge. Additionally, cultural visits to Washington D.C., Virginia, Philadelphia, and New York and others have enriched their understanding of American history and society.

Led by esteemed professors, this summer school fosters academic excellence and intercultural exchange.

The program runs from July 15 to August 15.
